quotes.text: Indie hackers who ship weekly grow faster than indie hackers who ship quarterly. Ship more, learn faster.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Indie hackers who ship weekly have 10x the chances of finding product-market fit than those who ship quarterly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Ship weekly or don't ship at all. The gap between weekly and quarterly is the gap between learning and guessing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team's velocity is a reflection of your leadership. If they're slow, look in the mirror.
quotes.author: based
